summary: Completed comprehensive testing of L/NL (Less/Not Less) diamond studded charges functionality. All backend calculation engine tests passed (11/11), diamond-specific API tests passed (6/6), and UI functionality fully verified through browser automation.
passed_tests: Backend calculation engine - all 11 tests passed including diamond L/NL logic
Diamond API endpoint tests - NL default behavior verified
Diamond API endpoint tests - L weight deduction logic verified (2.5ct × 0.2g = 0.5g)
Diamond API endpoint tests - Mixed L/NL entries correctly handled
Diamond API endpoint tests - Making charges recalculate on adjusted net weight
Diamond API endpoint tests - Studded charge details include weight_grams field
UI Login - admin/admin1123 credentials working
UI Navigation - successful access to draft bill and item calculator
UI Item Type Selection - Diamond type selection working
UI Rate Mode Selection - Normal rate mode selection working
UI Purity Selection - 22KT purity selection working
UI Form Fields - Gross weight (10g), Less (0.5g) input working
UI Net Weight - Initial calculation showing 9.500g correctly
UI Diamond Studded Charges - Addition of 2.5 carats @ ₹50,000/carat working
UI L/NL Radio Buttons - Both options visible and functional
UI NL Default - NL (Not Less) selected by default as expected
UI L Selection - L (Less) radio button click working
UI Weight Deduction - Net weight correctly updated from 9.500g to 9.000g
UI Deduction Message - '-0.500g from net wt' message displayed correctly
UI Deduction Summary - 'Total studded deduction (L entries): -0.500g' shown
UI Gold Value Recalculation - Gold value updates based on new net weight
UI Mixed Entries - Second studded entry (Solitaire) with NL doesn't affect weight
UI Toggle Functionality - L/NL radio buttons work in both directions
